# discord_thread (Resource)

Manages a thread within a Discord text or announcement channel.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_thread" "release_notes" {
  channel_id            = "456789012345678901"
  name                  = "Release Notes"
  auto_archive_duration = 1440 # minutes
  rate_limit_per_user   = 10
  invitable             = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the parent channel the thread is created in.
- `name` (String) Thread name.

### Optional

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the thread is archived.
- `auto_archive_duration` (Number) Minutes of inactivity before the thread is archived (60, 1440, 4320, or 10080).
- `invitable` (Boolean) Whether non-moderators can add other members to a private thread.
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the thread is locked (only moderators can unarchive it).
- `rate_limit_per_user` (Number) Slowmode in seconds (0–21600).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the thread.
